You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/distributed-tracing-console-plugin/source/web/src/pages/TracesPage/ScatterPlot.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 41
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
   40            <Button
   41              variant="link"
   42              className="pf-m-link pf-v5-u-text-align-right"

```

### Fix 2
Line: 42
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-text-align-right]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-text-align-right' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-u-text-align-right' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-m-link pf-v5-u-text-align-right

Code context:
```
   41              variant="link"
   42              className="pf-m-link pf-v5-u-text-align-right"
   43              onClick={() => setVisible(!isVisible)}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 40
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: FlexItem

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   39          <FlexItem align={{ default: 'alignRight' }}>
   40            <Button
   41              variant="link"

```

### Fix 4
Line: 30
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext]:
Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>

Incident context:
  componentName: EmptyState
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Bullseye

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: EmptyState
Prop: titleText
To: React.ReactNode

Code context:
```
   29      <Bullseye>
   30        <EmptyState>
   31          <EmptyStateBody>{t('No datapoints found.')}</EmptyStateBody>

```

### Fix 5
Line: 42
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-u-text-align-right]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-text-align-right' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-u-text-align-right' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-m-link pf-v5-u-text-align-right

Code context:
```
   41              variant="link"
   42              className="pf-m-link pf-v5-u-text-align-right"
   43              onClick={() => setVisible(!isVisible)}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/distributed-tracing-console-plugin/source/web/src/pages/TracesPage/ScatterPlot.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 (Line 41): `Button.variant` type changed
The value used is `"link"`, which is valid in both old and new type unions. **No change needed.**

### Fix 2 & Fix 5 (Line 42): CSS class `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` removed
Both fixes say the same thing — the class `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` was removed and has no `pf-v6` equivalent. I need to remove it. The `className` currently is `"pf-m-link pf-v5-u-text-align-right"`. I should remove `pf-v5-u-text-align-right`. I'll also check if `pf-m-link` is still valid — it's a PatternFly modifier class. Since `variant="link"` is already set, the `pf-m-link` class is redundant (the Button component applies it automatically based on the variant prop). I can replace with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` for the alignment, or just remove the className entirely since the alignment can be handled differently.

Actually, let me be conservative — I should only remove the class that the fix tells me to remove. The fix only mentions `pf-v5-u-text-align-right`. I'll keep `pf-m-link` and use inline style for right alignment.

Wait, but `pf-m-link` is also suspicious — it's a modifier that the Button component applies internally when `variant="link"`. Keeping it is harmless but redundant. Let me focus on what the fixes ask: remove `pf-v5-u-text-align-right`. I'll replace with inline style for the text-align.

### Fix 3 (Line 40): Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
The Button contains icons (`CompressIcon` and `ExpandIcon`) alongside text. Per the fix, when a Button has an icon AND text, move the icon to the `icon` prop:
```
Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>
```

The current code has conditional rendering with icons and text. I need to move the icons to the `icon` prop.

### Fix 4 (Line 30): EmptyState `titleText` prop
In PF v6, EmptyState requires a `titleText` prop. The current EmptyState has only `EmptyStateBody` as a child with "No datapoints found." text. There's no title content being passed as children — the only child is `EmptyStateBody`. I should add a `titleText` prop with appropriate content. Since there's no obvious title, I'll use something sensible based on the context — "No datapoints found" is already in the body text, so a reasonable title would be a heading like "No results" or similar. Actually, looking at PF v6 migration patterns, `titleText` is required. I'll set it to an empty string or a contextually appropriate value. Given the context of a scatter plot with no data, `titleText={t('No results')}` seems appropriate. But to be minimally invasive and not invent new content, I could use `titleText={t('No datapoints found.')}` and potentially remove or simplify the body. Actually, the safest approach is to just add `titleText=""` or better, provide a meaningful title and keep the body as-is.

Let me write the fixed file:

arguments.after:
<Button
            variant="link"
            className="pf-m-link"
            style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}
            onClick={() => setVisible(!isVisible)}
            icon={isVisible ? <CompressIcon /> : <ExpandIcon />}
          >
            {isVisible ? t('Hide graph') : t('Show graph')}
          </Button>
arguments.before:
<Button
            variant="link"
            className="pf-m-link pf-v5-u-text-align-right"
            onClick={() => setVisible(!isVisible)}
          >
            {isVisible ? (
              <>
                <CompressIcon /> {t('Hide graph')}
              </>
            ) : (
              <>
                <ExpandIcon /> {t('Show graph')}
              </>
            )}
          </Button>

content.text: Now let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct. Let me verify all changes are sound:

1. **Fix 1 (variant="link")**: The value `"link"` exists in both old and new type unions — no change needed.
2. **Fix 2 & 5 (CSS class removed)**: `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` removed from `className`, replaced with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` for equivalent behavior.
3. **Fix 3 (icon to prop)**: `CompressIcon` and `ExpandIcon` moved from children into the `icon` prop. Text remains as children. The fragment wrappers (`<>...</>`) are no longer needed since icon and text are now separated.
4. **Fix 4 (EmptyState titleText)**: Added `titleText={t('No results')}` prop to `<EmptyState>`. The body text is preserved as-is.

All imports remain valid — `CompressIcon`, `ExpandIcon`, `EmptyStateBody`, `Button`, `EmptyState`, etc. are all still referenced. No dead imports to clean up.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Detail |
|-----|------|--------|--------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **Already valid — no change needed** | `variant="link"` is valid in both the old and new type unions |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-text-align-right` | **Applied** | Removed `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` from `className`; replaced with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` for equivalent alignment |
| Fix 3 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-button` | **Applied** | Moved `<CompressIcon />` and `<ExpandIcon />` from Button children to the `icon` prop; text content remains as children; removed now-unnecessary fragment wrappers |
| Fix 4 | `sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext` | **Applied** | Added `titleText={t('No results')}` prop to `<EmptyState>`; kept `<EmptyStateBody>` with descriptive text as children |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-u-text-align-right` | **Applied** | Same class as Fix 2 — addressed together by removing `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` and using inline `textAlign` style |

chunks.response:
The file looks correct. Let me verify all changes are sound:

1. **Fix 1 (variant="link")**: The value `"link"` exists in both old and new type unions — no change needed.
2. **Fix 2 & 5 (CSS class removed)**: `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` removed from `className`, replaced with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` for equivalent behavior.
3. **Fix 3 (icon to prop)**: `CompressIcon` and `ExpandIcon` moved from children into the `icon` prop. Text remains as children. The fragment wrappers (`<>...</>`) are no longer needed since icon and text are now separated.
4. **Fix 4 (EmptyState titleText)**: Added `titleText={t('No results')}` prop to `<EmptyState>`. The body text is preserved as-is.

All imports remain valid — `CompressIcon`, `ExpandIcon`, `EmptyStateBody`, `Button`, `EmptyState`, etc. are all still referenced. No dead imports to clean up.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Detail |
|-----|------|--------|--------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **Already valid — no change needed** | `variant="link"` is valid in both the old and new type unions |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-text-align-right` | **Applied** | Removed `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` from `className`; replaced with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` for equivalent alignment |
| Fix 3 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-button` | **Applied** | Moved `<CompressIcon />` and `<ExpandIcon />` from Button children to the `icon` prop; text content remains as children; removed now-unnecessary fragment wrappers |
| Fix 4 | `sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext` | **Applied** | Added `titleText={t('No results')}` prop to `<EmptyState>`; kept `<EmptyStateBody>` with descriptive text as children |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-u-text-align-right` | **Applied** | Same class as Fix 2 — addressed together by removing `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` and using inline `textAlign` style |
